title: PS3 Custom Theme Thread
wikitext: []: PS3 Custom Theme Thread             Quote Post by TheStentch » Wed Mar 13, 2013 10:34 pm Thread Topics : Requests for Evangelion Themes, How To's to make your own, creative discussion pertaining to how to make your console more Evangelion themed inside and out. So I just bought a PS3. I wanted to pimp my theme out all Evangelion style. I search the interwebs and find like 3 terrible themes IMO and find nothing on the greatest eva forum I have ever found. I have never created a PS3 theme before however found the tools and template. Today marks Day 1 in my progression for making PS3 themes. Teaser! AsukaMadness - Work In Progress If you are interested in creating a theme of your own or have a request after I complete AsukaMadness please feel free to post here and continue the discussion. I hope I posted in the right sub forum and I hope evageeks allows this type of discussion as being a fan there really isn't that much out there in regards to ps3 themes that I could find. I wanted to post my unique works here solely. Day 2 I have learned what is needed for "dynamic backgrounds" you must convert about 8 seconds of video and keep every other frame then convert to a .dds and use xml. A more detailed version of this explanation will be in the how to's. I will be putting in a great deal of work this weekend into the creation and testing of the theme after I know it works 100% and looks great I will then post shots of how it looks and if within board rules a download to the legal and safe theme .zip. After completion, requests are fine I will try to help how I can and give back to the community. Day 3 I apologize for my sluggishness my new job has been keeping me busy. I have gotten it working now comes the artistic part of doing everything else but the video background.

Article: PS3 Custom Theme Thread
[]: PS3 Custom Theme Thread             Quote Post by TheStentch » Wed Mar 13, 2013 10:34 pm Thread Topics : Requests for Evangelion Themes, How To's to make your own, creative discussion pertaining to how to make your console more Evangelion themed inside and out. So I just bought a PS3. I wanted to pimp my theme out all Evangelion style. I search the interwebs and find like 3 terrible themes IMO and find nothing on the greatest eva forum I have ever found. I have never created a PS3 theme before however found the tools and template. Today marks Day 1 in my progression for making PS3 themes. Teaser! AsukaMadness - Work In Progress If you are interested in creating a theme of your own or have a request after I complete AsukaMadness please feel free to post here and continue the discussion. I hope I posted in the right sub forum and I hope evageeks allows this type of discussion as being a fan there really isn't that much out there in regards to ps3 themes that I could find. I wanted to post my unique works here solely. Day 2 I have learned what is needed for "dynamic backgrounds" you must convert about 8 seconds of video and keep every other frame then convert to a .dds and use xml. A more detailed version of this explanation will be in the how to's. I will be putting in a great deal of work this weekend into the creation and testing of the theme after I know it works 100% and looks great I will then post shots of how it looks and if within board rules a download to the legal and safe theme .zip. After completion, requests are fine I will try to help how I can and give back to the community. Day 3 I apologize for my sluggishness my new job has been keeping me busy. I have gotten it working now comes the artistic part of doing everything else but the video background.
